title: Screaming chicken sounds
description: This is a joke resourcepack that replaces all minecraft sounds with the meme "chicken scream" sound
body:
## screaming chicken instead of all sounds 1.17 (native but works on any version)
have you ever wanted to get your ears raped by the screaming chicken literally every action you do, no? well i don't care because now you can! 
generated by my own software as a showcase! (soon avalible on github)
>  Post Scriptum: if you have any questions/suggestions - feel free to dm me on telegram (@forkosssa)
